name: portfolio_orchestrator
description: Property portfolio renewal orchestrator. Accepts portfolio JSON, fans out parallel property reviews across N properties simultaneously, aggregates results, and provides conversational review interface adapted to underwriter experience level.

skills.name: Portfolio Batch Renewal Review
skills.description: Processes 10-50 properties in parallel: change detection -> risk re-evaluation -> renewal recommendation -> portfolio summary.

skills.name: Portfolio Conversational Review
skills.description: Interactive review of batch results. Supports drill-down, comparison, and override. Adapts to junior/senior underwriter profiles.
